summary: Hand-built task write commands (add/edit/delete/complete/reopen) now emit a dry-run envelope via emitTaskDryRun under --dry-run instead of returning nil silently.
reason: Under `--dry-run --json` the task write commands returned nil with no output, so a machine caller piping --json got an empty stream that fails JSON parsing (live-dogfood json-fidelity probe). The generated endpoint mirrors already emit a JSON dry-run envelope; this aligns the hand-built task writes (internal/cli/tasks_write.go) with that contract. tasks_write.go is novel-feature code, not generator output, so this is a behavioral fix to preserve across reprints rather than a generator divergence.
validated_outcome: Full live dogfood gate green; `tasks edit <id> --priority top --due ... --dry-run --json` and `tasks delete <id> --dry-run --json` emit a valid JSON envelope (action/resource/path/dry_run/success).
